narrative:
Sugarcreek township has 8,798 registered voters, with 52.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.8 percentage points.
